records.question: Which actors named Lynne McGranger played the character Irene Roberts in roles containing 1993— and were at most 21 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.character = 'Irene Roberts' AND actor.duration LIKE '%1993—%' AND actor.name = 'Lynne McGranger' AND actor.age <= 21
records.pred_sql: SELECT actor.Actor_ID FROM actor JOIN musical ON actor.Musical_ID = musical.Musical_ID WHERE actor.Name = 'Lynne McGranger' AND actor.Character = 'Irene Roberts' AND musical.Year BETWEEN 1993 AND 1993 AND actor.age <= 21

records.question: Which actors named Ray Meagher have played Alf Stewart, include a duration containing 1988—, and are at least 26 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.age >= 26 AND actor.character = 'Alf Stewart' AND actor.duration LIKE '%1988—%' AND actor.name = 'Ray Meagher'
records.pred_sql: SELECT actor.Actor_ID FROM actor WHERE actor.Name = 'Ray Meagher' AND actor.Character = 'Alf Stewart' AND actor.Duration LIKE '%1988%' AND actor.age >= 26

records.question: Which actors whose character is Karl Kennedy have a connection to another actor through their musical ID matching that actor’s ID?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
JOIN actor AS actor__1 ON actor.musical_id = actor__1.actor_id
WHERE actor.character = 'Karl Kennedy'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.Actor_ID 
FROM actor a 
JOIN actor b ON a.Musical_ID = b.Actor_ID 
WHERE a.Character = 'Karl Kennedy'

records.question: Which actors named Tom Oliver are at most 22 years old and associated with another actor through their musical ID?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
JOIN actor AS actor__1 ON actor.musical_id = actor__1.actor_id
WHERE actor.age <= 22 AND actor.name = 'Tom Oliver'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.Actor_ID FROM actor a 
WHERE a.Name = 'Tom Oliver' AND a.age <= 22

records.question: Which actors named Lynne McGranger are at least 21 years old and associated with another actor through their musical ID?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
JOIN actor AS actor__1 ON actor.musical_id = actor__1.actor_id
WHERE actor.age >= 21 AND actor.name = 'Lynne McGranger'
records.pred_sql: SELECT actor.Actor_ID FROM actor WHERE actor.Name = 'Lynne McGranger' AND actor.age >= 21 AND actor.Musical_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT Musical_ID FROM actor WHERE Musical_ID IS NOT NULL)
